entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The primary crop being studied for hybrid breeding to elevate yield levels

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The primary productivity trait used to evaluate the performance of pigeonpea hybrids

entities.name: ICPH 2671
entities.description: The world's first grain legume hybrid of pigeonpea showing significant yield advantage

entities.name: CMS LINES
entities.description: Cytoplasmic male sterile lines used as female parents in hybrid breeding

entities.name: TESTER LINES
entities.description: Lines used to test the combining ability of CMS lines in hybrid breeding

entities.name: GENOMIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The genetic variation within a population used to predict optimal parental combinations

entities.name: PHENOTYPING DATA
entities.description: Physical trait measurements used alongside genomic data to define heterotic pools

entities.name: HETEROTIC POOLS
entities.description: Groups of genetically diverse parents that produce superior hybrids

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A crop species where heterotic pools have been successfully defined

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A crop species where heterotic pools have been successfully defined

entities.name: SUNFLOWER
entities.description: A crop species where heterotic pools have been successfully defined

entities.name: RAPESEEDS
entities.description: A crop species where heterotic pools have been successfully defined

entities.name: WHOLE GENOME RE-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A genomic approach used to identify SNPs and structural variations in parental lines

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms identified across parental lines for genomic selection

entities.name: STRUCTURAL VARIATIONS
entities.description: Genomic variations including copy number and presence/absence variations

entities.name: COPY NUMBER VARIATIONS
entities.description: A specific type of structural variation identified in the genome

entities.name: PRESENCE/ABSENCE VARIATIONS
entities.description: A specific type of structural variation identified in the genome

entities.name: FACTORIAL MATING DESIGN
entities.description: A breeding design used to develop test crosses for hybrid evaluation

entities.name: F1 HYBRIDS
entities.description: First-generation hybrids produced from parental crosses for phenotyping

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the phenotyping of pigeonpea hybrids was conducted

entities.name: ICRISAT TELANGANA STATE
entities.description: A phenotyping location in Telangana State, India

entities.name: ARS-GULBARGA KARNATAKA
entities.description: A phenotyping location in Karnataka, India

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A method combining SNP variations and phenotypic data to define heterotic pools

entities.name: HYBRID BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing hybrid varieties to increase crop yield

relationships.description: Pigeonpea hybrids are evaluated for their yield advantage
ICPH 2671 is a specific hybrid variety of pigeonpea
CMS lines are used as parents in the hybrid breeding process
Tester lines are used as parents in the hybrid breeding process
Genomic diversity is used to predict parental combinations for heterotic pools
Phenotyping data is used to define heterotic pools
Heterotic pools have been defined in maize
Heterotic pools have been defined in rice
Heterotic pools have been defined in sunflower
Heterotic pools have been defined in rapeseeds
Whole genome re-sequencing is used to identify SNPs
Whole genome re-sequencing is used to identify structural variations
Copy number variations are a type of structural variation
Presence/absence variations are a type of structural variation
Factorial mating design is used to develop F1 hybrids
F1 hybrids are phenotyped for yield and yield-related traits
F1 hybrids were phenotyped at ICRISAT Telangana State
F1 hybrids were phenotyped at ARS-Gulbarga Karnataka
Genomic selection is used to define heterotic pools
SNPs are used as markers in genomic selection
Phenotyping data is combined with SNP variations for genomic selection
Defining heterotic pools accelerates the hybrid breeding program
Hybrid breeding is applied to pigeonpea to increase yield
ICRISAT Telangana State is located in India
ARS-Gulbarga Karnataka is located in India
